zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Lamphere於1721年12月14日出生在美國羅得島華盛頓維斯特利時，她的父親Theodosius Lamphere36歲，母親Rachel Covey34歲。她於1738年1月21日與James Hope Covey Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德金斯維斯特利結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1795年3月19日在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦斯東寧頓享年73歲，埋葬在美國羅得島華盛頓維斯特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Lamphere于1721年12月14日出生在美国罗德岛州華盛頓維斯特利时，她的父亲Theodosius Lamphere36岁，母亲Rachel Covey34岁。她于1738年1月21日与James Hope Covey Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德金斯維斯特利结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1795年3月19日在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦斯東寧頓享年73岁，埋葬在美国罗德岛州華盛頓維斯特利。

nameMeanings.name: Lamphere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Lanfear  .

variants.name: Lanfear
meanings: Welsh and English: habitational name from any of the many places in Wales called Llanfair ‘church of Saint Mary’, from Welsh llan ‘church’ + Mair ‘Mary’, for example Llanfair Caereinion (Montgomeryshire). Compare Lamphear , Lamphere , Lamphier , Lanfair , Lanphear , Lanpher , Lanphere , and Lanphier .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Rhode Island Declares Independence
historicEvents.description: Rhode Island declares independence from Great Britain on May 4, 1776, making it the first colony to do so officially.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Rhode Island Declares Independence from Great Britain

historicEvents.title: French Occupy Newport
historicEvents.description: During 1780 to 1781, over 12,000 French troops occupy Newport, Rhode Island.

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Lamphere was born on 14 December 1721, in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, United States, her father, Theodosius Lamphere, was 36 and her mother, Rachel Covey, was 34. She married James Hope Covey Jr. on 21 January 1738, in Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 19 March 1795, in Stonington, New London, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 73, and was buried in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Lamphere est née le 14 décembre 1721, à Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, États-Unis, son père, Theodosius Lamphere, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Rachel Covey, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé James Hope Covey Jr. le 21 janvier 1738, à Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 mars 1795, à Stonington, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Lamphere am 14. Dezember 1721 in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Theodosius Lamphere 36 und ihre Mutter Rachel Covey 34. Sie hat am 21. Januar 1738 in Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America James Hope Covey Jr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. März 1795 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Stonington, New London, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Lamphere è nata il il 14 dicembre 1721 nel Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Theodosius Lamphere, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Rachel Covey, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato James Hope Covey Jr. il 21 gennaio 1738, nel Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 19 marzo 1795, nel Stonington, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Lamphereが1721年12月14日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ワシュイントンウエステルリーで生まれた時，父Theodosius Lamphereは36歳，母Rachel Coveyは34歳であった。1738年1月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドキングズウエステルリーでJames Hope Covey Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1795年3月19日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドンストニントンで73歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ワシュイントンウエステルリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Lamphere(이)가 1721년 12월 14일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 웨스털리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Theodosius Lamphere(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rachel Covey(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1738년 1월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 킨그스 웨스털리에서 James Hope Covey Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1795년 3월 19일 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 스토닝턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 웨스털리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Lamphere nasceu em 14 de dezembro de 1721, em Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Theodosius Lamphere, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Rachel Covey, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com James Hope Covey Jr. em 21 de janeiro de 1738, em Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de março de 1795, em Stonington, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Lamphere родилась 14 декабря 1721 г. в местности вестирли, вашингтон, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Theodosius Lamphere было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Rachel Covey, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Hope Covey Jr. 21 января 1738 г. в местности вестирли, кингс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 19 марта 1795 г. в местности стонингтон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности вестирли, вашингтон, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Lamphere nació el 14 de diciembre de 1721, en Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos, su papá, Theodosius Lamphere, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Rachel Covey, tenía 34 años. Se casó con James Hope Covey Jr. el 21 de enero de 1738, en Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 19 de marzo de 1795, en Stonington, New London, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos.
